entity.summary: Decentralized exchange on Cronos zkEVM supporting token swaps, multihop and split routing, classic V2 liquidity pools, concentrated V3 liquidity pools, farming, and related DeFi services.
entity.notes: HEI models the H2 Finance, H2 Finance V2, and H2 Finance V3 discovery rows as one exchange entity. First-party documentation describes H2 Finance as a DEX on Cronos zkEVM and documents both V2 and V3 liquidity and swap routing under the same platform.

evidence.title: What is H2 Finance?
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies H2 Finance as a decentralized exchange on Cronos zkEVM and lists swaps, liquidity pools, farms, and Paymaster functionality.

evidence.title: H2 Finance Trade documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party trade documentation describes live token swaps, V2 and V3 liquidity routing, multihop routing, split routing, slippage settings, and trading fees.

evidence.title: H2 Finance Liquidity documentation
evidence.notes: First-party liquidity documentation describes current Classic V2 pools and Flexible V3 concentrated-liquidity pools under one H2 Finance platform.
